# ── Workspace / storage resolution ───────────────────────────────────────────
workspace = mssparkutils.env.getWorkspaceName()

if workspace == 'pins-synw-odw-prod-uks':
    storage_account = 'pinsstmpescproduksqz8bvk'
elif workspace == 'pins-synw-odw-dev-uks':
    storage_account = 'pinsstmpescdevuksw49hqz'
else:
    raise ValueError(f'Unknown workspace: {workspace}')

base_path = f'abfss://mpesc@{storage_account}.dfs.core.windows.net'

# ── 1. Load case IDs from batch1_cases.csv ────────────────────────────────────
batch_df = spark.read.option('header', 'true').csv(f'{base_path}/config/Cases/archive/batch1_cases.csv')
case_ids = set(row['Case ID'] for row in batch_df.select('Case ID').collect())
print(f'Loaded {len(case_ids)} case IDs')

# ── 2. List all folders under MPESC-EXTRACT/LLAttr/ ──────────────────────────
ll_attr_path = f'{base_path}/MPESC-EXTRACT/LLAttr'
folders = [f.path for f in mssparkutils.fs.ls(ll_attr_path)]
print(f'Found {len(folders)} folders')

# ── 3. Loop folders, filter CSVs by ID, write output ─────────────────────────
output_base = f'{base_path}/MPESC-EXTRACT/LLAttr-Filtered'

for folder_path in folders:
    folder_name = folder_path.rstrip('/').split('/')[-1]
    
    try:
        files = mssparkutils.fs.ls(folder_path)
    except Exception as e:
        print(f'  Skipping {folder_name}: {e}')
        continue

    csv_files = [f.path for f in files if f.name.endswith('.csv')]
    
    for csv_path in csv_files:
        file_name = csv_path.split('/')[-1]
        
        df = spark.read.option('header', 'true').option('sep', '|').csv(csv_path)
        
        if 'ID' not in df.columns:
            print(f'  {folder_name}/{file_name} — no "ID" column, skipping')
            continue
        
        filtered = df.filter(df['ID'].isin(case_ids))
        count = filtered.count()
        
        if count == 0:
            print(f'  {folder_name}/{file_name} — 0 matches, skipping')
            continue
        
        print(f'  {folder_name}/{file_name} — {count} rows matched')
        
        staging_path = f'{output_base}/{folder_name}/_staging_{file_name}'
        out_path     = f'{output_base}/{folder_name}/{file_name}'
        
        filtered.coalesce(1).write.option('header', 'true').option('sep', '|').mode('overwrite').csv(staging_path)
        
        part_file = [f.path for f in mssparkutils.fs.ls(staging_path) if f.name.startswith('part-')][0]
        
        try:
            mssparkutils.fs.rm(out_path, recurse=True)
        except:
            pass
        
        mssparkutils.fs.mv(part_file, out_path)
        mssparkutils.fs.rm(staging_path, recurse=True)
        
        print(f'    → written to {out_path}')

# ── 4. Filter Horizon_CaseReference.csv by CaseNodeId ────────────────────────
horizon_path = f'{base_path}/MPESC-EXTRACT/Horizon_CaseReference.csv'
horizon_df = spark.read.option('header', 'true').option('sep', '|').csv(horizon_path)

horizon_filtered = horizon_df.filter(horizon_df['CaseNodeId'].isin(case_ids))
print(f'Horizon_CaseReference — {horizon_filtered.count()} rows matched')

horizon_staging = f'{output_base}/_staging_Horizon_CaseReference'

horizon_filtered.coalesce(1).write.option('header', 'true').option('sep', '|').mode('overwrite').csv(horizon_staging)

part_file = [f.path for f in mssparkutils.fs.ls(horizon_staging) if f.name.startswith('part-')][0]

try:
    mssparkutils.fs.rm(f'{output_base}/Horizon_CaseReference.csv', recurse=True)
except:
    pass

mssparkutils.fs.mv(part_file, f'{output_base}/Horizon_CaseReference.csv')
mssparkutils.fs.rm(horizon_staging, recurse=True)

print(f'  → written to {output_base}/Horizon_CaseReference.csv')

# ── 5. Filter LLAttrData.csv by ID ───────────────────────────────────────────
ll_attr_data_path = f'{base_path}/MPESC-EXTRACT/LLAttrData.csv'
ll_attr_data_df = spark.read.option('header', 'true').option('sep', '|').csv(ll_attr_data_path)

ll_attr_data_filtered = ll_attr_data_df.filter(ll_attr_data_df['ID'].isin(case_ids))
print(f'LLAttrData — {ll_attr_data_filtered.count()} rows matched')

ll_attr_data_staging = f'{output_base}/_staging_LLAttrData'

ll_attr_data_filtered.coalesce(1).write.option('header', 'true').option('sep', '|').mode('overwrite').csv(ll_attr_data_staging)

part_file = [f.path for f in mssparkutils.fs.ls(ll_attr_data_staging) if f.name.startswith('part-')][0]

try:
    mssparkutils.fs.rm(f'{output_base}/LLAttrData.csv', recurse=True)
except:
    pass

mssparkutils.fs.mv(part_file, f'{output_base}/LLAttrData.csv')
mssparkutils.fs.rm(ll_attr_data_staging, recurse=True)

print(f'  → written to {output_base}/LLAttrData.csv')

# ── 6. Copy Contacts files into LLAttr-Filtered ──────────────────────────────
for contacts_file in ['Contacts_Organisation.csv', 'Contacts_Person.csv']:
    src = f'{base_path}/MPESC-EXTRACT/{contacts_file}'
    dst = f'{output_base}/{contacts_file}'
    try:
        mssparkutils.fs.rm(dst, recurse=True)
    except:
        pass
    mssparkutils.fs.cp(src, dst)
    print(f'  → copied {contacts_file} to {output_base}')

print('\nDone.')
